action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 2 failed because ReduceLROnPlateau received an unexpected keyword argument 'verbose' in the installed PyTorch version. The data loading and model initialization succeeded. Analysis: This is a simple API mismatch; removing verbose=True fixes it. Decision: Rewrite train.py with the bug fixed, keep model.py and predict.py unchanged, run a short 3-epoch training to validate end-to-end, test predict.py locally, and immediately submit evaluation to measure iteration time and establish a baseline ic_mean score.
action.command: python train.py --epochs 3 && python predict.py --data_path local_test_eval --checkpoint checkpoints --output local_test_eval/output.json
